<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk005.pdf#page=10 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p218 -->

<!-- header: FURHOLZEN -->

<!-- header: FÜRHOLZEN -->


[[File:Band06_chunk005_p010_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk005_p010_img002.jpg|thumb|Steinigung des hl. Stephanus, Ausschnitt aus Fresko A]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p219 -->
